name: Windows Brute-force targeting Non-Existent Users
description: Phát hiện hành vi dò quét, đăng nhập liên tục vào các tài khoản không tồn tại trên hệ thống (SubStatus: 0xc0000064) dựa trên IP nguồn.

data_sources.notes: Need SubStatus and source.ip fields for non-existent user detection.

false_positive_scenarios: Misconfigured application or approved username enumeration testing
tuning_notes: Exclude known application sources that repeatedly attempt stale usernames.

priority_questions: Is this source probing multiple non-existent accounts?
Did the same IP later target valid usernames?
enrichment_queries: Search same source.ip across all failed logons in the last 24h
Check network ownership and reputation of source.ip

validation.test_strategy: Replay invalid-user authentication failures in dev index.
validation.expected_outcome: Rule triggers when invalid-user threshold is met.
